replies.msg:
想問下gym room 啲機邊到入貨
想買部兩邊sling果隻

I highly recommend that you join the eight year membership st pure fitness. My cousin's husband who's a personal trainer in pure fitness recommended that I should join the membership which grants you access to the swimming pool, the jacuzzi pool and the sauna room as well as the gym. I thoroughly recommend joining it because the membership costs one thousand three hundred and twenty dollars a month which is well enough it for the wide range of facilities you can use. My cousin's husband heartily recommended the supplement brand American Bodybuilding to me. He thoroughly recommended that I should take caesin protein every night after bed because it's slow digesting which extends the release of amino acids to muscle tissue. I heartily recommend weight gainer and soy protein to you too along with caesin protein as they are ideal supplements for muscle growth. It's recommended that you take soy protein before your workout, weight gainer immediately after your gym session and caesin protein before you go to sleep. I would certainly recommend that you should take these supplements every day because they hell you gain muscle and strength. May I suggest that you think carefully before purchasing any supplements? Don't waste money on useless supplements. I would personally recommend you should take AST Multivitamins for overall health.
My friend Ken is a gym membership salesman who will be making a follow-up call and sending a follow-up email to a customer who's interested in joining the ten year membership. I used to work in a gym and whenever a customer paid a visit to the gym I always followed it up with a call or an email. Some of my colleagues followed it up with a visit to the customer. My friend Tomiko is interested in joining the gym Ken works in. He had a meeting yesterday and a follow-up has been scheduled for tomorrow. She's also writing a sequel to the acclaimed "The invisible man" so she's been so busy that she won't have time to pay a follow-up visit to the gym for the time being. Therefore I handed Tomiko the membership agreement for Ken and will follow up with Tomiko in the next few days. The membership costs one thousand dollars a month which is well worth it for the whole range of facilities you can use. The membership grants you access to the swimming pool as well as the gym. They sell a tub of whey protein for four hundred dollars which is well worth it as it's normally two times more expensive. The cost of a tub of soy protein has edged up by six dollars whereas that of caesin protein has edged lower by ten dollars. The cost of creatine has edged down to three hundred dollars while that of nitric oxide has edged higher from three hundred dollars to three twenty dollars. Last Tuesday Tomiko complained that she was treated badly at Starbucks. As a result, a barista provided a referral to a senior staff member who in turn referred her case to the manager. She'll follow the case up with the manager to be sure that it'll be dealt with seriously. In addition she's been I'll work a stomachache and a stroke so I referred her to a gastroenterologist and a cardiologist. Recently she posted on an online forum and suggested that the government should build an art gallery so as to boost tourism which was supported by many people on the forum. They asked the forum administrator for a referral to a district councilor. They'll follow the issue up with the district councilor. I too will follow up the matter being discussed. His suggestions for the city's future and the citizens are deemed appropriate. Just the other day Ken and I visited a museum where we looked at every single huge nineteenth-century oil painting they have there in minute detail so as not to miss any wonderful things. Yesterday he gave a party in Rosewood hotel rather than his home so as not to disturb his neighbours.
